code:
import io
import string
import list

fn byte_or(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn lget(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = byte_or(s, i)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut value = 0
      mut parsing = true
      while parsing
        if i >= n
          parsing = false
        else
          let c = byte_or(s, i)
          if c >= 48 and c <= 57
            value = value * 10 + (c - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            parsing = false
          end
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, value * sign)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sorted_insert(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let v = lget(xs, i)
    if not inserted and x < v
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = a.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let v = lget(a, i)
    if list.contains(b, v) and not list.contains(result, v)
      result = sorted_insert(result, v)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_or_empty()
  let line2 = read_or_empty()
  let a = parse_ints(line1)
  let b = parse_ints(line2)
  let result = intersect(a, b)
  let n = result.len()
  if n == 0
    println("empty")
  else
    mut s = ""
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      let v = lget(result, i)
      if i == 0
        s = "#{v}"
      else
        s = "#{s} #{v}"
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(s)
  end
end
